title: Recipes Refreshed
description: Changes vanilla recipes to make them more fair. Why does the stair recipe give you 4 stairs?! Make it 6. (Now Configurable!)
body:
# Recipes Refreshed
Introducing "Recipes Refreshed" - the ultimate Minecraft mod for more efficient crafting.
Mojang clearly doesn't understand conservation of mass, so we fixed some recipes!

If you want **more**, check out [PLUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/recipes-refreshed-plus).

In this version you get:

## Crafting
- 6 stairs instead of 4
- 4 fences instead of 3
- 2 fence gates instead of 1
- 2 pressure plates instead of 1
- 4 buttons instead of 1
- 6 Trapdoors instead of 2

## Other
- Blast glass in the blast furnace
- Use deepslate in the stonecutter
- Get cobblestone in the stonecutter

## Now Configurable
Want 1178 stairs instead of 6? To each their own I guess. Don't like an addition? Turn it off. The mod now has a fully functioning configuration file.
